violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has individual trained in food safety; individual must register with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, Ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be cleaned, establishment to send a photo to RIDOH once cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to hire licensed pest control company. Full evaluation is to be completed. Inspection report from Pest Control is to be available to RIDOH inspector on Re-Inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2024
